Tests the immutability of the 'length' property on Function.prototype.toString.

# Purpose
This code is a set of assertions that test the properties of the `Function.prototype.toString` method in JavaScript. It checks if the `toString` method has a `length` property by using `hasOwnProperty`. The code then attempts to delete the `length` property and asserts that the deletion is unsuccessful, confirming that the `length` property is non-configurable. These assertions ensure that the `length` property of `Function.prototype.toString` behaves as expected according to the ECMAScript specification.
